_comment: Highlight formats supported (newest first): 1) Plain string, 2) {text}, 3) {text, sub: 'string'} for one sub, 4) {text, children: [...]} for one or more children — each child can recurse with its own children

2024.text: Alex lost in week 15 to MobClassic, came back through the losers bracket, and won the championship anyway.
BigBickBaniel finished 11-3 with the best regular-season record and never played in a championship game.

children.text: Second-highest fpts in the league. Gone in the first round.

2024: Skratchmonkey went 4-10, made the championship, and lost 134-194.

2024.text: MobClassic put up 180 to knock Alex out in week 15, then scored 92 in week 16.

children.text: Lost by 75. Peaked at the wrong time.

2024.text: Henny led the entire league in points scored and potential points and didn't win a ring.

children.text: 2137 fpts, 2512 potential. Most productive roster, zero hardware.

2024.text: Alex traded Tyreek Hill for Travis Kelce in week 3.

children.text: Tyreek had a historically bad season. Kelce anchored the title run.

2024.text: Alex picked up Brock Bowers in a week 4 three-way trade.

children.text: Bowers set the NFL record for rookie TE receptions. Paired with Kelce, it was over.

2024.text: frankenjoyer dealt the #1 overall pick in week 4 and still made the playoffs.

children.text: Lost to blaz300 — the team that took the pick — by 2.2 points.

2024: Jose guts his whole team for Christian McCaffrey, who, when he returns, only plays 2 games and gets injured again.
Henny flies up the standings by playing the waiver wire exceptionally well.

2024.text: Jose claims he knows more about football than Jason.

2024: Alex is exposed as a corrupt commissioner.

2024.text: Jose pumps Jason's team with bad trades.

children.text: Jason still doesn't make the playoffs.

2024: Henny changes team name to "I Let Him Off the Hook" after Alex wins the championship.
Tee Higgins puts up a top-10 league performance in the championship round to help Alex win the league.
2025: Michael threw his team and juiced Nick.
No one wanted to trade and bitched when Jose and Damien Traded 🙂

2025.text: Alex decided to become a dictator again.

children.text: He has become babysitter, dictator of fantasy.

2025: Justin went from last to finals, then lost because of Puka.

2025.text: Jose threw on purpose so Cat wouldnt win toilet bowl.

children.text: Jose claims he did not throw.
Do you want me to come over?
It was nice being your friend while it lasted. 😢
